description: Create src/Router.sol scaffold: frozen public interface for audit, including SwapParams and MultiSwapParams structs, the full error catalog from the spec's Error Handling table, the Swap event, constants (MAX_PROTOCOL_FEE_BPS=200, MAX_PARTNER_FEE_BPS=200, NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL=0xEeeeeEeeeEeEeeEeEeEeeEEEeeeeEeeeeeeeEEeE), access control (Ownable2Step owner + separate liquidator address, Pausable), executor two-step registry (pendingExecutor/executor + setPendingExecutor/acceptExecutor), and sweep functions (transferRouterFunds, swapRouterFunds). swap() and swapMulti() entry points MUST be declared with their final signatures but body reverts with a NotImplemented() error -- bodies land in INF-0005 and INF-0006. Contract is nonReentrant-guarded via OZ ReentrancyGuard. This task freezes the Router ABI so test/deploy tasks can compile against it in parallel.
commit: feat(router): scaffold Router with access control, registry, and sweep
steps: Create src/Router.sol (BUSL-1.1, pragma 0.8.24). Imports: IERC20, SafeERC20, Ownable2Step, Ownable (for Ownable2Step base), Pausable, ReentrancyGuard from @openzeppelin/contracts, plus src/interfaces/IExecutor.sol.

Declare constants: `address public constant NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL = 0xEeeeeEeeeEeEeeEeEeEeeEEEeeeeEeeeeeeeEEeE;` `uint256 public constant MAX_PROTOCOL_FEE_BPS = 200;` `uint256 public constant MAX_PARTNER_FEE_BPS = 200;` (sentinel name matches spec §FR-12 and §Decisions Log).

Declare structs matching the spec exactly: `struct SwapParams { address inputToken; uint256 inputAmount; address outputToken; uint256 outputQuote; uint256 outputMin; address recipient; uint16 protocolFeeBps; uint16 partnerFeeBps; address partnerRecipient; bool partnerFeeOnOutput; bool passPositiveSlippageToUser; bytes32[] weirollCommands; bytes[] weirollState; }` and `struct MultiSwapParams { address[] inputTokens; uint256[] inputAmounts; address[] outputTokens; uint256[] outputQuotes; uint256[] outputMins; address recipient; uint16 protocolFeeBps; uint16 partnerFeeBps; address partnerRecipient; bool partnerFeeOnOutput; bool passPositiveSlippageToUser; bytes32[] weirollCommands; bytes[] weirollState; }`

Declare errors exactly matching the spec's Error Handling table: ZeroInputAmount, ZeroOutputQuote, ZeroOutputMin, InvalidSlippageBounds, SelfSwap, ProtocolFeeExceedsCap(uint256 bps), PartnerFeeExceedsCap(uint256 bps), InvalidPartnerRecipient, ETHValueMismatch, SlippageExceeded(address token, uint256 got, uint256 min), ETHTransferFailed, DuplicateToken(address token), InputOutputIntersection(address token), Unauthorized, Paused, NotImplemented, ExecutorNotSet, ZeroAddress, ArrayLengthMismatch. Override OpenZeppelin Pausable's `_requireNotPaused()` to `revert Paused()` so the spec-named error is what reverts at the swap entry points.

Declare the Swap event: `event Swap(address indexed sender, address inputToken, uint256 inputAmount, address outputToken, uint256 amountOut, uint256 amountToUser, uint256 protocolFee, uint256 partnerFee, uint256 positiveSlippageCaptured, address partnerRecipient);` plus admin events LiquidatorUpdated(address old, address current), PendingExecutorSet(address), ExecutorUpdated(address old, address current), FundsTransferred(address[] tokens, uint256[] amounts, address dest).

Declare storage: `address public executor;` `address public pendingExecutor;` `address public liquidator;`. Implement constructor `constructor(address _owner, address _liquidator) Ownable(_owner)` that sets liquidator (revert ZeroAddress if either is zero). Implement `modifier onlyOwnerOrLiquidator()` reverting Unauthorized.

Implement admin surface: `setPendingExecutor(address)` onlyOwner, emits PendingExecutorSet; `acceptExecutor()` onlyOwner (requires msg.sender to be the caller -- spec is owner-driven; reject if pendingExecutor is zero), updates executor, zeroes pendingExecutor, emits ExecutorUpdated; `setLiquidator(address)` onlyOwner emits LiquidatorUpdated (allow zero to disable); `pause()` and `unpause()` onlyOwner via Pausable.

Implement swap(SwapParams calldata params) external payable nonReentrant whenNotPaused returns (uint256 amountOut) { revert NotImplemented(); } and swapMulti(MultiSwapParams calldata params) external payable nonReentrant whenNotPaused returns (uint256[] memory amountsOut) { revert NotImplemented(); } -- bodies land in INF-0005 and INF-0006.

Implement sweep functions: `function transferRouterFunds(address[] calldata tokens, uint256[] calldata amounts, address dest) external` gated by onlyOwnerOrLiquidator; revert ArrayLengthMismatch if lengths differ, ZeroAddress if dest is zero; iterate and transfer using SafeERC20 for tokens and low-level call for NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL (revert ETHTransferFailed on failure). `function swapRouterFunds(SwapParams calldata params) external onlyOwnerOrLiquidator returns (uint256)` that reuses swap() internals by calling swap internally (can revert NotImplemented in this scaffold; actual impl lands with INF-0005). Emit FundsTransferred from transferRouterFunds. Add receive() external payable {} so Router can hold ETH fees.
acceptance_criteria: [auto] File src/Router.sol exists and `forge build` compiles with zero errors.
[auto] grep -n 'contract Router is Ownable2Step, Pausable, ReentrancyGuard' src/Router.sol matches exactly one line.
[auto] grep -n 'uint256 public constant MAX_PROTOCOL_FEE_BPS = 200' src/Router.sol matches exactly one line and same for MAX_PARTNER_FEE_BPS = 200.
[auto] grep -n 'address public constant NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL = 0xEeeeeEeeeEeEeeEeEeEeeEEEeeeeEeeeeeeeEEeE' src/Router.sol matches exactly one line.
[auto] grep -n 'struct SwapParams\|struct MultiSwapParams' src/Router.sol matches exactly two lines.
[auto] grep -n 'event Swap(' src/Router.sol matches exactly one line.

[auto] grep -n 'error ZeroInputAmount\|error ZeroOutputQuote\|error ZeroOutputMin\|error InvalidSlippageBounds\|error SelfSwap\|error ProtocolFeeExceedsCap\|error PartnerFeeExceedsCap\|error InvalidPartnerRecipient\|error ETHValueMismatch\|error SlippageExceeded\|error ETHTransferFailed\|error DuplicateToken\|error InputOutputIntersection\|error Unauthorized\|error Paused\|error NotImplemented' src/Router.sol returns 16 matches.

[auto] grep -n 'function setPendingExecutor\|function acceptExecutor\|function setLiquidator\|function pause\|function unpause\|function transferRouterFunds\|function swapRouterFunds' src/Router.sol returns 7 matches.

[auto] `forge inspect Router abi` contains entries for swap, swapMulti, setPendingExecutor, acceptExecutor, setLiquidator, pause, unpause, transferRouterFunds, swapRouterFunds, executor (view), pendingExecutor (view), liquidator (view).
[manual] swap() and swapMulti() bodies revert NotImplemented() in this task; real implementations land in INF-0005/INF-0006 without changing signatures.
[manual] transferRouterFunds correctly handles both ERC20 (SafeERC20.safeTransfer) and NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL (low-level call with ETHTransferFailed revert on false).

[manual] Swap event declared with exactly the 10 FR-17 fields in order: sender (indexed), inputToken, inputAmount, outputToken, amountOut, amountToUser, protocolFee, partnerFee, positiveSlippageCaptured, partnerRecipient.
implementation_notes: Added src/Router.sol freezing the full audit-facing ABI: Ownable2Step + Pausable + ReentrancyGuard base, SwapParams/MultiSwapParams structs, all 19 spec errors (Paused lives in a same-file RouterErrors library to avoid colliding with OZ's inherited `Paused(address)` event; the override of `_requireNotPaused` reverts `RouterErrors.Paused()` so the spec-named selector is what users see), the 10-field FR-17 Swap event plus admin events, executor two-step registry, owner/liquidator sweep via transferRouterFunds, and swap/swapMulti/swapRouterFunds signatures that revert NotImplemented() for INF-0005/INF-0006. forge build, forge test, and forge fmt --check all clean; inspect abi contains every required entry. Commit: 23ac5f8.
